description_long: This is a stylized child dressed in a Viking-inspired costume, featuring a horned helmet with a fur trim, a sleeveless armored chest piece, and bracers on both arms. The child wears fitted pants with knee guards and boots, and a wide belt with a circular buckle. The shoulders are adorned with a textured fur cape, adding to the costume's dramatic effect. The arms are extended horizontally, and the hands and face are exposed, with no visible accessories such as bags or tools. The overall appearance is playful and imaginative, suitable for a themed event or parade in an urban setting.
description: A child in a Viking-themed costume with a horned helmet, fur cape, armor, and boots, arms outstretched in a standing pose.
description_view_0: Front view shows the horned helmet, fur-trimmed shoulders, armored chest, belt, and boots, with arms extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the horned helmet, fur cape, and the layered armor on the arm and leg.
description_view_2: Back view displays the full fur cape, back of the helmet, and the rear details of the belt and boots.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the horn and fur details, and the side profile of the costume.
attribute_clothing_type: Viking-style costume with horned helmet, sleeveless armored top, fur cape, bracers, fitted pants, and boots
attribute_hairstyle: short straight hair with a visible fringe beneath the helmet
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
